scenario.en: A 68-year-old male presents with sudden crushing chest pain radiating to his left jaw. He is sweating profusely and feels nauseated.
scenario.th: ผู้ป่วยชายอายุ 68 ปี มาด้วยอาการเจ็บแน่นหน้าอกร้าวไปกรามซ้าย เหงื่อแตก และคลื่นไส้

interprofessional_answers.doctor: Acute Inferior Wall MI - Primary PCI of Right Coronary Artery (RCA).
interprofessional_answers.pharmacy: Aspirin 300mg, Clopidogrel 600mg, and Heparin. Avoid Nitrates if RV infarct suspected.
interprofessional_answers.nursing: Monitor BP closely, EKG monitoring, and prepare for defibrillation if needed.
interprofessional_answers.ams: Immediate Troponin T and CK-MB assay. Check PT/INR for baseline.
interprofessional_answers.dentistry: Stop any procedure. Administer Aspirin and activate EMS immediately.
interprofessional_answers.vet: Check for VPCs or arrhythmias in canine patients with similar presentation.
interprofessional_answers.public health: Identify smoking status and promote smoking cessation programs.

scenario.en: A 75-year-old female presents with progressive shortness of breath, orthopnea, and bilateral leg swelling for 1 week.
scenario.th: ผู้ป่วยหญิงอายุ 75 ปี มาด้วยอาการเหนื่อยหอบมากขึ้นเรื่อยๆ ต้องนอนหมอนสูง และขาบวมทั้งสองข้างมา 1 สัปดาห์

interprofessional_answers.doctor: Acute Decompensated Heart Failure (ADHF) - Loop Diuretics.
interprofessional_answers.pharmacy: IV Furosemide, monitor Potassium levels and Renal function.
interprofessional_answers.nursing: Strict Intake/Output chart, Daily weight, and Low salt diet education.
interprofessional_answers.ams: Check electrolytes (K+, Na+) and Kidney function (Cr, BUN).
interprofessional_answers.dentistry: Patient may not tolerate supine position due to orthopnea.
interprofessional_answers.vet: Dilated Cardiomyopathy (DCM) or Mitral Valve Disease in older dogs.
interprofessional_answers.public health: Education on salt reduction and adherence to hypertension meds.

scenario.en: A 35-year-old female smoker on oral contraceptives presents with sudden sharp right-sided chest pain and tachypnea.
scenario.th: ผู้ป่วยหญิงอายุ 35 ปี สูบบุหรี่และทานยาคุมกำเนิด มาด้วยอาการเจ็บหน้าอกข้างขวาแปล๊บๆ เฉียบพลันและหายใจเร็ว

interprofessional_answers.pharmacy: Low Molecular Weight Heparin (LMWH) or Direct Oral Anticoagulants (DOACs).
interprofessional_answers.nursing: O2 supplement, monitor for signs of DVT in lower limbs.
interprofessional_answers.ams: High D-dimer confirms thrombus activity; need CT confirmation.
interprofessional_answers.dentistry: Risk of bleeding if patient is started on anticoagulants.
interprofessional_answers.vet: Feline Aortic Thromboembolism (FATE) - similar vascular occlusion logic.
interprofessional_answers.public health: Counseling on smoking and hormonal contraceptive risks.

scenario.en: A 40-year-old male with a history of IV drug use presents with high fever, chills, and a new systolic murmur at the apex.
scenario.th: ผู้ป่วยชายอายุ 40 ปี ประวัติใช้ยาเสพติดฉีดเข้าเส้น มาด้วยไข้สูง หนาวสั่น และตรวจพบเสียง Murmur ใหม่ที่หัวใจ

interprofessional_answers.doctor: Infective Endocarditis - Empirical IV Antibiotics (Vancomycin + Ceftriaxone).
interprofessional_answers.pharmacy: Ensure proper IV antibiotic dosing and monitor for Vancomycin toxicity (Cr).
interprofessional_answers.nursing: Monitor fever spikes and neurological signs for embolic stroke.
interprofessional_answers.ams: Serial blood cultures (3 sets) and monitor inflammatory markers (CRP/ESR).
interprofessional_answers.dentistry: Crucial: History of poor oral hygiene or recent dental extraction?
interprofessional_answers.vet: Bacterial endocarditis can occur in dogs with periodontal disease.
interprofessional_answers.public health: Needle exchange programs and oral hygiene awareness.

scenario.en: A 50-year-old male presents with sudden 'tearing' chest pain radiating to his back. His BP is 180/110 in the right arm and 140/90 in the left arm.
scenario.th: ผู้ป่วยชายอายุ 50 ปี มาด้วยอาการเจ็บหน้าอกเหมือนโดนฉีกขาดร้าวไปที่หลัง ความดันแขนขวา 180/110 แขนซ้าย 140/90

interprofessional_answers.doctor: Stanford Type A Aortic Dissection - Immediate Surgical Repair.
interprofessional_answers.pharmacy: Esmolol or Labetalol infusion to decrease HR and BP (Shear stress).
interprofessional_answers.nursing: Maintain target SBP 100-120 mmHg. Pain control is vital.
interprofessional_answers.ams: Check Hb/Hct for internal bleeding. Type and Cross-match 10 units of Blood.
interprofessional_answers.dentistry: Extremely high risk. Avoid any stress or local anesthetics with Epinephrine.
interprofessional_answers.vet: Aortic aneurysm/dissection is rare but reported in giant breed dogs.
interprofessional_answers.public health: Importance of long-term hypertension control in the population.

scenario.en: A 22-year-old athlete collapsed during a marathon. On exam, he has a loud systolic murmur that increases with Valsalva maneuver.
scenario.th: นักกีฬาอายุ 22 ปี หมดสติขณะวิ่งมาราธอน ตรวจร่างกายพบเสียง Murmur ที่ดังขึ้นเมื่อทำ Valsalva maneuver

interprofessional_answers.doctor: Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy (HCM) - Screen for Sudden Cardiac Death risk.
interprofessional_answers.nursing: Ensure patient avoids strenuous exercise and stays hydrated.
interprofessional_answers.ams: Genetic testing may be indicated for family screening.
interprofessional_answers.vet: HCM is the most common heart disease in cats (Main Coon/Ragdoll).
interprofessional_answers.public health: Pre-participation screening for young athletes in schools.
